mapper.sql: ci.id AS id, ci.quantity AS quantity, p.id AS productId, p.thumbnail_url AS thumbnailUrl, p.name AS name, p.price AS price
FROM products p JOIN cart_items ci ON p.id = ci.product_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cart_items (product_id, username, quantity) VALUES (#{cartItem.productId}, #{cartItem.username}, #{cartItem.quantity}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE quantity = quantity + VALUES(quantity)
